name: GMO Cloud

when_to_use: Japanese VPS and hosting for domestic JP web applications
SSL certificates and bare-metal hosting for Japanese SMBs
WordPress and web app hosting on Japanese infrastructure
Low-cost managed hosting for Japanese SaaS builders
Data residency in Japan for compliance-sensitive applications

cons: Fewer managed services than big clouds
review.verdict: Reasonable domestic Japanese cloud, a tough pick if you need global scale or English support.
review.best_for: Japanese SaaS teams with domestic-first customer bases
review.not_for: International teams needing English docs and multi-region footprint

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription; downgradable next cycle, no explicit peak-lock.
